title: Caramelized Sweet Potato and Flaky Chicken Tacos
description: A delicious and flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring caramelized sweet potatoes, flaky chicken, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Caramelize the sweet potatoes by roasting them in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
In a separate pan, cook the chicken breasts over medium heat until cooked through.
Shred the cooked chicken into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together the shredded chicken, caramelized sweet potatoes, and anchovy paste.
Add the shredded american cheese to the bowl and stir until combined.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the chicken and sweet potato mixture onto a tortilla and serving immediately.
